metadata.Description: Free DNS hosting, lets you fully manage your own domain.  Dynamic DNS and Static DNS services available.  You may also create hosts off other domains that we host upon the domain owners consent, we have several domains to choose from!
metadata.Keywords: freedns, free dns, dns, dns hosting, domain hosting, free domain hosting, live dns hosting, fast dns hosting, dynamic dns
